name: idea-console
description: IDEA Console — real-time operator dashboard for the IDEA Engine network

scripts.build: { sudo rm -rf dist 2>/dev/null || rm -rf dist 2>/dev/null || true; } && vite build
scripts.package: pnpm build && rm -rf /tmp/idea-console-pkg && mkdir /tmp/idea-console-pkg && zip -r /tmp/idea-console-pkg/extension.zip dist/ && echo '\n  Download: http://<pi-tailscale-ip>:8080/extension.zip\n' && cd /tmp/idea-console-pkg && python3 -m http.server 8080
